## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt` is clean (`gofmt -l .` prints nothing)
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Test coverage is maintained (≥ 80%)
- [ ] Exported symbols have doc comments
- [ ] README / docs updated if behavior changed
